summary: Set up Vitest with jsdom. 68 tests passing covering core ETL transform logic (100% coverage on transform utils, 100% on stores, 97.95% on frontend utils). Overall project coverage is ~10% because React pages and API routes require complex mocking (Prisma database, jsdom DOM). Build passes (357KB JS, 22.6KB CSS). Cannot reach 95% test coverage without extensive additional infrastructure for React component testing and Prisma mocking.
next_action: Cannot advance to security phase: test coverage 10% << 95% threshold. Would need React Testing Library setup + Prisma route mocking to meaningfully increase coverage. Core business logic IS fully tested.
